name: Meetup Pro
description: Meetup Pro — Network management tool for running multiple Meetup groups with unified analytics and sponsorship.

seo.title: Meetup Pro — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Meetup Pro: Meetup Pro — Network management tool for running multiple Meetup groups with unified analytics and sponsorship.

when_to_use: Running a multi-city developer meetup network from one dashboard
Unified analytics across all groups in a meetup network
Sponsorship management and reporting for a developer community
Coordinating RSVPs and scheduling across a regional event series
DevRel team managing multiple Meetup groups via Pro APIs

pros: Manage many groups from one dashboard
Trusted legacy brand for local events
review.verdict: Still useful for multi-chapter in-person programs, but the product has not kept pace.
review.best_for: Developer relations and brand teams running many local chapters with unified reporting.
review.not_for: Online-first or newer community brands where Meetup adds little lift.
